_comment: Single source of truth for the /integrations page list AND the IntegrationsGrid hero card. Edit here once; both surfaces update.

items.name: Greenhouse
items.body: Auto-trigger packages on stage move; report PDF attached to candidate profile.

items.name: Lever
items.body: Two-way sync of background check status, requisition + offer stages.

items.name: Workday
items.body: Pre-hire screening with Workday Recruiting and Onboarding workflows.

items.name: BambooHR
items.body: New-hire automation: kick off MVR + drug screen at offer acceptance.

items.name: Bullhorn
items.body: Native panel for staffing teams; bulk-order packages from a tearsheet.

items.name: Workable
items.body: One-click background check from candidate profile, results in-app.

items.name: JazzHR
items.body: Trigger checks at any pipeline stage and send candidate-facing forms.

items.name: iCIMS
items.body: Marketplace integration; full bi-directional status + report sync.

items.name: ADP Workforce Now
items.body: Roll background check results into your onboarding + payroll setup.

items.name: Paylocity
items.body: Run pre-hire screens and write outcomes into Paylocity onboarding.

items.name: SAP SuccessFactors
items.body: Enterprise-grade integration for global hiring with localized packages.

items.name: Salesforce
items.body: Custom-built for staffing and BPO clients — request access from the team.
